category_sources: source_facts.description says SQL-like frontend to PCAP files; official DNS-OARC page describes PacketQ as a command-line tool for SQL queries on PCAP files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is packetq; official DNS-OARC page heading uses PacketQ.
docs_sources: Official DNS-OARC PacketQ page links to README, FAQ, functions, and fields documentation on the official Codeberg repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official DNS-OARC PacketQ page lists Code Repositories and gives git clone https://codeberg.org/DNS-OARC/PacketQ.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SQL-like PCAP querying; official DNS-OARC page says PacketQ runs SQL queries directly on PCAPs and links functions/fields docs.
